title: The Golem's Testimony
description: The golem has been tested with 2 ingredients. Deduce the reaction pattern and identify the target group.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing3: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing5: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
Chest reacts to G+S. Ears react to R+L. An animator needs BOTH. Cross-reference with untested ingredients.
The animators are: ingredients [3, 5]. Alch: ing3→Nnp, ing5→Ppn.
